rows.notes: Both extractors agreed on row type and no monetary amounts. Visually verified 'praesentis' (gemini-flash) over 'presentis' (gpt-5-mini) for the description.

rows.description: Gwinear Rect. pro dim. an. ad fest. Annunc.
rows.notes: Monetary amounts are in consensus. Visually verified 'Annunc.' (gemini-flash) over 'Annue.' (gpt-5-mini) for the description.
rows.english_description: Half-yearly payment from the rectory of Gwinear, due at the Feast of the Annunciation (Lady Day).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Half-yearly payment from the rectory of Gwinear at the Annunciation, amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Monetary amounts are in consensus. Visually verified gemini-flash's description 'Kiddington Rect. pro vd. frument. 80.7.6' as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Kidlington Rect. pro red. farmsd. 80.7.6'. Both correctly identified '80.7.6' as part of the description.
rows.english_description: Receipt from the rectory of Kiddington relating to grain (frumentum).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from the rectory of Kiddington relating to grain, amounting to £83 2s 6d.

rows.notes: Monetary amounts are in consensus. Visually, 'Capers & Brown' is a more accurate transcription of the description than 'Copps & Brown' (gemini-flash). gpt-5-mini incorrectly included the amount '2-15-0' in its description field, which was removed.
rows.english_description: Payment received from Capers and Brown (names of payers).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment received from Capers and Brown, amounting to £2 15s 0d.

rows.notes: Monetary amounts are in consensus. Visually verified 'Mich.' (gemini-flash) over 'Mid.' (gpt-5-mini) for the description.
rows.english_description: Michaelmas payment from the rectory of Menheniot for 1787.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Michaelmas payment from the rectory of Menheniot, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Monetary amounts are in consensus, with both correctly interpreting '04' as 4 pounds. Visually verified gemini-flash's description 'Kiddington Vic. ad Mich. 1787.' as more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Kidlington Vic. ad mid. 1787'.
rows.english_description: Michaelmas payment from the vicarage of Kiddington for 1787.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Michaelmas payment from the vicarage of Kiddington, amounting to £4 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Full consensus between all extractors for description and monetary amounts. Clear reading from the image.
rows.english_description: Payment at the said feast (Michaelmas) from the rectory of Yardington.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment at the said feast from the rectory of Yardington, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: Yardington Tenem. ad dict. fest. Michaelis
rows.notes: Description and whole monetary amounts (£8 14s 5d) are in consensus. For the pence fraction, gpt-5-mini's note provided a detailed visual interpretation of a small trailing loop on the '5' as a halfpenny (0.5), which is plausible given the ledger's style and the clear halfpenny in the total line. Visual verification supports this interpretation despite the faintness of the mark.
rows.english_description: Michaelmas payment for the Yardington tenement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Michaelmas payment for the Yardington tenement, amounting to £8 14s 5½d.

rows.description: Thos. Kennely for a Year to Lady Day 1787.
rows.notes: Monetary amounts are in consensus. Visually verified gemini-flash's description 'Thos. Kennely for a Year to Lady Day 1787.' as significantly more accurate than gpt-5-mini's 'Annuity for a year to Lady Day 1787'.
rows.english_description: Annual payment from Thomas Kennely due to Lady Day 1787.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Annual payment from Thomas Kennely to Lady Day 1787, amounting to £5 0s 0d.

rows.description: Back Gate House now Cossins aff. Year & 1/2.
rows.notes: Monetary amounts are in consensus. Visually verified gemini-flash's description 'Back Gate House now Cossins aff. Year & 1/2.' as more accurate for the faded portions than gpt-5-mini's 'Back Gate School now Coppen of Yeal of Michl'. Acknowledged description is slightly faded.
rows.english_description: Rent for Back Gate House (now occupied by Cossins) covering a year and a half.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent for Back Gate House (now Cossins) for a year and a half, amounting to £6 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Monetary amounts are in consensus and clearly visible, including the halfpenny. gpt-5-mini accurately included the 'L.' and repeated numerical values found in the description column, which is visible on the page, unlike gemini-flash which left the description blank.
